race.comment: MOON SWEEPER (1) progressive gelding building a good Highway record. Kept fresh for this after he demolished a similar line-up in the heavy going over 1500m at Rosehill as a dominant fav. Well weighted with the 3kg claimer and should prove too strong from the draw. CONCOCTION (2) just under a month between runs when he launched late from back in the field with a narrow second over 1400m at Rosehill in this grade. Ready for the 1600m and shapes as a leading player with Fitzgerald's 3kg claim. SAINTLY SANDS (8) won two in a row on the country tracks then came to town with an eye-catching tenth over 1500m at Rosehill from a wide barrier. Can race a touch closer and surprise at the good odds. RED RAGS TO BULLS (7) frustrating mare who will be doing her best work late down the outside.
